title: ferray-linalg: svd hermitian= parameter missing — no fast path for symmetric matrices
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.linalg.svd(a, hermitian=True) uses eigendecomposition instead of SVD when the matrix is symmetric/Hermitian, which is ~2x faster. ferray-linalg's svd() has no hermitian parameter. For symmetric matrices, the singular values are the absolute eigenvalues, and this can be computed via eigh() which is significantly cheaper than full SVD.
